sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى نَوْمٍ كَافٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je neophodno za mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is essential for mental health.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْإِنْسَانُ إِلَى ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ النَّوْمِ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ تَقْرِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Čovjeku je potrebno oko osam sati sna svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: A person needs about eight hours of sleep every night.

sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْجَيِّدُ يُسَاعِدُ عَلَى التَّرْكِيزِ وَيُقَلِّلُ التَّوَتُّرَ خِلَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Dobar san pomaže u koncentraciji i smanjuje stres tokom dana.
sentences.translationEn: Good sleep helps with concentration and reduces stress during the day.
